suggested_questions.question: What were BH retail total net sales and gross value for the current business month?
Which sales employees generated the highest order quantity in the latest reporting month?
How have BH retail net sales trended monthly over the past twelve business months?
Which sales territories contributed the most gross value during the current business month?
How many productive calls did each field employee record during the current week?
What is the outlet coverage percentage by sales position on the latest report date?
Which sales employees are below target achievement for the current BH retail business month?
Which ten products generated the highest net sales value from BH retail orders?
Which distributors handled the highest number of BH retail orders during last quarter?
What is the average order value for each employee in the current business month?
How has new outlet growth changed month over month across sales regions?
Which clients placed the largest BH retail orders by gross value this month?
How is net sales value distributed by product category for the latest business month?
Which sales positions show declining productive calls compared with the previous business month?
What percentage of retail outlets did each territory cover during the previous week?
Which employees exceeded their sales targets by the highest achievement percentage this business month?
How has the daily BH retail order count trended during the current month?
Which regions have the lowest net sales value compared with their assigned targets?
How is order quantity distributed across product categories during the current quarter?
Which employees recorded orders but had low productive call counts this business month?
How do gross value and net sales value compare by distributor for the latest month?
Which territories added the most new outlets during the current business month?
Which employees had no recorded BH retail orders on the latest report date?
Which ten sales positions have the highest month-to-date net sales achievement?
Which product categories show the largest gap between gross value and net sales value?
How does outlet productivity vary across regions in the current reporting period?
Which clients contributed most to month-to-date sales growth compared with last month?
How has retail order volume varied by day across the last thirty report dates?
Which employees have the highest average quantity sold per productive call?
Which territories have high outlet coverage but low sales target achievement?
